title: dodonaea calycina var. genuina
intro: Dodonaea calycina var. genuina is a specific variety of the Dodonaea calycina plant, a type of shrub native to Australia, belonging to the Sapindaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dodonaea calycina var. genuina include its ability to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in traditional herbal remedies for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.
